jobs.title: Senior Architect
jobs.description: Lead architectural design for residential and commercial projects. Experience with Vastu-compliant designs and modern construction techniques preferred.

jobs.title: Civil Engineer
jobs.description: Oversee construction quality, structural design, and site supervision for ongoing residential projects. B.Tech in Civil Engineering required.

jobs.title: Sales Executive - Real Estate
jobs.description: Drive property sales for luxury apartments, villas, and plots. Strong communication skills and real estate market knowledge required.

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.description: Manage residential and commercial construction projects from planning to delivery, coordinating with architects, contractors, and stakeholders.

jobs.title: Interior Designer
jobs.description: Design premium interior spaces for model apartments and show villas. Experience with luxury residential interiors and 3D visualization required.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Plan and execute marketing campaigns for new project launches including digital marketing, events, and brand communications.
